title: Milestone 5 — Worker topology + distrust (audit + hardening)
approach: audit + hardening pass: the worker-topology + distrust contract is mostly encoded (AGENTS/PLAN/fabric.json). This spec audits it for six residual gaps (extensions default contradicts AGENTS; Makora allowlist not pinned; no canonical dispatch block; 1-Makora enforcement mechanism not stated; single-writer policy has no smoke; host-derived candidate intake is prose not encoded), hardens them, and defines the worker-topology smoke (runs in milestone 6). Two operator decisions pending: pin subagents.extensions=false (recommended) and exclude bash from the Makora allowlist (recommended). Same shape as milestone 4.
blocks: No custom host-side semaphore extension or atomic single-writer lease (v1 policy)

success_criteria.criterion: subagents.extensions is false (safe read-only default; Makora overrides true per-call)
Makora writable allowlist is concretely pinned in PLAN.md (not just the words 'exact allowlist')
PLAN.md has a canonical Makora agents.run dispatch block with extensions:true + thinking:max
1-Makora enforcement mechanism stated in AGENTS + PLAN (Main's one-blocking-writable-run discipline, not maxConcurrent)
success_criteria.verify: rg -qi 'one blocking|at most one.*agents\.run|writable run at a time|one.*blocking.*writable' AGENTS.md .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md

success_criteria.criterion: ship.md encodes host-derived candidate intake (Main recomputes paths/hashes from the worktree, not worker self-report)
PLAN.md defines the worker-topology smoke (two concurrent writable -> one runs; read-only overlaps; Main edit refused)
No regression: milestone-3/4 static suite intact (frontmatter 9/9, forbidden CLEAN, slug 5/5, completion authority, canonical namespace)
success_criteria.verify:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const need={audit:["description","argument-hint"],create:["description","argument-hint"],fix:["description","argument-hint"],gc:["description"],init:["description","argument-hint"],plan:["description","argument-hint"],research:["description","argument-hint"],ship:["description","argument-hint"],verify:["description","argument-hint"]};for(const[f,keys]of Object.entries(need)){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m)process.exit(1);const got=[...m[1].matchAll(/^([\w-]+):/gm)].map(x=>x[1]);if(got.length!==keys.length||!keys.every(k=>got.includes(k)))process.exit(1)}' && (rg -q 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json|tasks\.json|audit-pattern|batch-implement|deep-research|review-state\.json|/ui-slop-check|/compound|progress\.md|audit\.md' .pi/prompts/*.md; [ $? -eq 1 ]) && for f in create plan ship verify research; do rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/$f.md || exit 1; done && rg -q 'cannot declare (terminal )?(verified status|completion)' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -qi 'sole.*verified|transcript only|no repository write' .pi/prompts/verify.md

success_criteria.criterion: Source command bodies unchanged (baseline-bound to bebd044)
prd graph bounded (2-3 tasks per child plan, <=3 files per task, ID-based deps)

tasks.title: Resolve extensions default + ADR-009 (fabric.json, AGENTS, DECISIONS)
tasks.end_state: .pi/fabric.json subagents.extensions pinned false (safe read-only default; Makora overrides true per-call). AGENTS.md states the default is false with Makora per-call true (deterministic, not per-call-dependent). DECISIONS.md has ADR-009 (safe default + per-call exception, mirroring ADR-003).
tasks.verify: jq -e '.subagents.extensions == false' .pi/fabric.json && rg -q '^## ADR-009:' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -qi 'extensions.*false.*default|default.*false.*extensions|read-only.*extensions.*false' AGENTS.md

tasks.title: Pin Makora allowlist + dispatch block + 1-Makora enforcement (PLAN, AGENTS)
tasks.end_state: PLAN.md pins the concrete Makora writable allowlist (read,grep,find,ls,edit,write — no bash) and a canonical per-call agents.run dispatch block (model, thinking:max, extensions:true, tools, worktree). PLAN.md + AGENTS.md state the 1-Makora enforcement mechanism (Main's one-blocking-writable-run discipline, not maxConcurrent).
tasks.verify: rg -q 'makora/zai-org/GLM-5.2-NVFP4' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md && rg -q 'thinking.*max' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md && rg -q 'extensions.*true' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md && rg -qi 'one blocking|at most one.*agents\.run|writable run at a time|one.*blocking.*writable' AGENTS.md .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md

tasks.title: Host-derived candidate intake + worker-topology smoke definition (ship.md, PLAN.md)
tasks.end_state: ship.md encodes a host-derived candidate-intake step (Main recomputes paths/hashes from the worktree via git status/diff/hash-object; worker self-report is advisory only, never the basis for staging). PLAN.md defines the worker-topology smoke (two concurrent writable -> one runs; read-only overlaps; Main edit refused by policy). All existing ship.md procedural content preserved.
tasks.verify: rg -qi 'host-derived|recomputes|git hash-object|git status|worker.*advisory|self-report' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -qi 'two.*implementation requests|one running|read-only.*overlap|Main.*edit.*refus' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md && git diff --exit-code bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459 -- .opencode/command/ship.md

tasks.title: Record candidate evidence (TODO, PROGRESS, state)
tasks.end_state: TODO.md, PROGRESS.md, and state.md record milestone-5 hardening complete but verification PENDING (not VERIFIED). Every A/B validator and the milestone-3/4 regression suite pass; commands/exit codes/limitations logged; runtime-smoke deferral noted.

tasks.title: Close implementation state (spec, prd, roadmap)
tasks.end_state: spec.md marks A1-C1 implemented; C2 explicitly pending external no-write verification; both operator resolutions approved. prd.json updated (C1 owns prd.json, write_paths, verified_paths, graph validators). roadmap.md milestone 5 marked implementation-done/verification-pending. jq validates prd.json. All remote synchronization complete before C2.

tasks.title: Final no-write static verification (external declaration only)
tasks.end_state: All success-criteria checks pass read-only; source command bodies unchanged against bebd044; git diff --check clean; local HEAD == remote main == remote main:master; fingerprint tuple captured before and after, unchanged. VERIFIED declared in response/session transcript only. No repository write after the baseline fingerprint. Runtime smoke remains milestone 6.
tasks.verify: fingerprint tuple captured and compared unchanged after every read-only validator; git diff --exit-code bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459 -- .opencode/command/; git diff --check; git rev-parse HEAD == origin/main == origin/master
